scope: legacy-parity read streams only (campaigns, canvases, segments); the events (custom event names) stream is out of scope for this bundle (see docs.md Known limits), and the full Braze API surface (messaging send endpoints, user data export/import, catalogs, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: engine's declarative array extraction (connsdk.RecordsAt) only yields JSON-object array elements; Braze's events/list returns an array of bare event-name STRINGS, which RecordsAt silently drops rather than wrapping into a record the way legacy's decodeRecords does; see docs.md Known limits
